content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
P.O. Box 807 • 428 J Street • Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

March 28, 2002

Deborah Mattas, Campaign Manager/Treasurer
Committee To Elect Thomas W. Martin
5663 Balboa Avenue, Suite 162
San Diego, CA 92111

Re: Your Request for Informal Assistance
Our File No. W-02-017

Dear Ms. Mattas:

This letter will serve to confirm that in our telephone conversation of February 26, 2002, you withdrew your request for advice on behalf of the Committee of Elect Thomas W. Martin.

If you have any questions, please feel free to call me at (866) 275-3772.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Jeanette E. Turvill
Political Reform Consultant
Technical Assistance Division

LM/jet/jt
